distinctive_elements: multiple parallax layers with monster integration

sources_used: Wikipedia - Shadow of the Beast III (Development section)

notes.platform_discrepancy: Source documents Amiga release (1992), not Genesis. Genesis version was considered in development but not confirmed as released.
notes.data_availability: T3 tier - source emphasizes graphics design methodology and visual architecture rather than specific sprite dimensions or palette counts.
notes.documented_details: Graphics developed by Martin Edmondson using DPaint IV on Amiga A3000. Focus on 'how many colours and layers of parallax' but specific counts not provided in source.
